interfaces.name: getHomepageContent
interfaces.description: Get core homepage content including mission, focus areas, and key programs copy.

interfaces.name: getHomepageHighlights
interfaces.description: Get featured conferences, events/workshops, and recent publications for the homepage.

interfaces.name: getMyAccountSummary
interfaces.description: Get a compact summary of the user's saved items for homepage widgets (schedule, bookmarks, reading list).

interfaces.name: getConferenceSearchOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Conferences & Calls page.

interfaces.name: searchConferences
interfaces.description: Search and filter conferences by region, date range, topic, attendee type, fee, and sort order.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search across titles, subtitles, and descriptions.

maxRegistrationFeeAmount.description: Maximum registration fee for the selected attendee type.

maxRegistrationFeeCurrency.description: Currency code for max fee, e.g., 'usd', 'eur'.

isInternational.description: If true, only include conferences marked as international.

locationDisplay.description: Human-readable location such as 'Paris, France' or 'Online'.

interfaces.name: getConferenceDetail
interfaces.description: Get full conference details for the Conference Detail page.

parameters.name: conferenceId
parameters.description: Conference identifier from the page URL.

interfaces.name: getConferenceProgram
interfaces.description: Get program overview including days and tracks for a conference.

parameters.name: conferenceId
parameters.description: Conference identifier from the page URL.

interfaces.name: getConferenceSessions
interfaces.description: Get conference sessions for the Program/Schedule tab with optional filters.

parameters.name: conferenceId
parameters.description: Conference identifier from the page URL.

dayIndex.description: 1-based index of the conference day to show.

trackId.description: Track identifier to limit sessions to a specific track.

startTimeFrom.description: Earliest session start time on that day (local time or ISO 8601).

endTimeTo.description: Latest session end time on that day (local time or ISO 8601).

interfaces.name: bookmarkConference
interfaces.description: Bookmark/save a conference for later reference. Creates the bookmark if it does not exist.

parameters.name: conferenceId
parameters.description: Conference identifier from the Conference Detail page.

interfaces.name: unbookmarkConference
interfaces.description: Remove a bookmarked conference from the user's saved list.

parameters.name: conferenceId
parameters.description: Conference identifier to remove from bookmarks.

interfaces.name: getBookmarkedConferences
interfaces.description: List all conferences bookmarked by the user for the My Account page.

interfaces.name: addSessionToPersonalSchedule
interfaces.description: Add a conference session to the user's personal schedule/agenda.

interfaces.name: removeSessionFromPersonalSchedule
interfaces.description: Remove a session from the user's personal schedule.

interfaces.name: getPersonalSchedule
interfaces.description: Get all sessions in the user's personal schedule for the My Schedule / Personal Agenda section.

conferenceId.description: If provided, limit schedule items to a specific conference.

interfaces.name: getResearcherSearchOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Researchers Directory page.

interfaces.name: searchResearchers
interfaces.description: Search and filter researchers by keyword, country, h-index, and expertise.

expertiseKeywords.description: List of expertise keywords to match.

interfaces.name: getResearcherProfile
interfaces.description: Get full researcher profile details for the Researcher Profile page.

parameters.name: researcherId
parameters.description: Researcher identifier from the profile URL.

interfaces.name: followResearcher
interfaces.description: Follow a researcher and add them to the Followed Researchers list.

interfaces.name: unfollowResearcher
interfaces.description: Unfollow a researcher and remove them from the Followed Researchers list.

interfaces.name: getFollowedResearchers
interfaces.description: Get all researchers the user is following for the My Account page.

interfaces.name: getPublicationSearchOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Publications & Papers page.

interfaces.name: searchPublications
interfaces.description: Search and filter publications by keyword, year range, access type, and journal impact factor.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text keyword search, e.g., 'renewable energy policy'.

interfaces.name: getPublicationDetail
interfaces.description: Get full publication details for the Publication Detail page.

parameters.name: publicationId
parameters.description: Publication identifier from the page URL.

interfaces.name: addPublicationToReadingList
interfaces.description: Add a publication to the user's reading list / saved publications.

interfaces.name: removePublicationFromReadingList
interfaces.description: Remove a publication from the user's reading list.

interfaces.name: getReadingList
interfaces.description: Get all publications saved in the user's reading list for the My Reading List page.

interfaces.name: getEventSearchOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Events & Workshops listing page.

interfaces.name: searchEvents
interfaces.description: Search and filter events and workshops by keyword, type, duration, date, and fee.

interfaces.name: getEventDetail
interfaces.description: Get full event or workshop details including available time slots and pricing.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: Event identifier from the page URL.

interfaces.name: submitEventRegistration
interfaces.description: Submit a registration or pre-registration for an event or workshop, including guest registration.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: Event identifier from the Event Detail page.

interfaces.name: getNewsletterTopics
interfaces.description: Get available newsletter topics and default settings for the newsletter subscriptions page.

interfaces.name: getNewsletterSubscriptionsForEmail
interfaces.description: Get existing newsletter subscriptions for a given email to prefill the preferences form.

interfaces.name: updateNewsletterSubscriptions
interfaces.description: Create or update newsletter subscriptions for the specified email address.

isActive.description: If false, subscription will be deactivated.

interfaces.name: getDonationPrograms
interfaces.description: Get a list of donation programs/funds that can be supported on the Donate / Support Us page.

interfaces.name: createDonationDraft
interfaces.description: Create a donation draft/intention with amount, allocation, anonymity, and communication preferences, stopping before payment.

interfaces.name: getMembershipPlans
interfaces.description: Get active membership plans (e.g., Student, Professional) with prices and benefits for the Membership Overview page.

currency.description: Default currency for displaying membership prices, e.g., 'usd'.

interfaces.name: startMembershipApplication
interfaces.description: Begin a membership application for a chosen plan, capturing initial applicant details.

parameters.name: planId
parameters.description: Membership plan identifier selected from the Membership Overview page.

interfaces.name: getMyAccountDetails
interfaces.description: Get all saved items for the My Account & Saved Items page (schedule, bookmarks, reading list, followed researchers).

interfaces.name: getAboutOrganizationContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About the Organization page, including mission, history, focus areas, and leadership.

interfaces.name: getContactInfo
interfaces.description: Get contact details and inquiry topics for the Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a contact form inquiry for conferences, publications, membership, donations, or other topics.

interfaces.name: getPolicyDocuments
interfaces.description: Get policy and terms content for the Policies & Terms page.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateUserState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize single-user state (bookmarks, schedule, reading list, follows, subscriptions) from storage.

helperFunctions.name: _saveUserState
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to persist the current single-user state back to storage.

helperFunctions.name: _resolveCheapestConferenceFee
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute the cheapest applicable ConferenceFee for a given attendee type.

helperFunctions.name: _filterSessionsByCriteria
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to filter ConferenceSession records by day index, keyword, track, and time window.
